commissioning.title: EnOcean BLE Auto-Commissioning
commissioning.description:
Activate auto-commissioning on {name}:

1. Hold button 1 for 7 seconds
2. Press button 1 briefly
3. Hold button 1 again for 7 seconds

You have 2 minutes. Retry if needed.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm EnOcean BLE Device
bluetooth_confirm.description:
EnOcean switch with address {mac} was commissioned successfully.

⚠️ Press another button to disable commissioning mode, then click Submit.

progress.waiting_commissioning: Hold button 1 for 7 seconds, then press button 1 briefly, and hold again for 7 seconds.

abort.no_bluetooth_discovery: This setup must start from a discovered Bluetooth device.
abort.not_enocean_prefix: This discovered device does not use the EnOcean BLE MAC prefix (E2:15).

error.commissioning_not_detected: No commissioning telegram was received within 2 minutes. Try again. If it still does not work after multiple attempts, you can try a factory reset. Please read the reset disclaimer in the documentation first.
error.invalid_commissioning: A commissioning telegram was received but could not be validated. Try again. If this keeps failing, review the factory reset disclaimer in the documentation before resetting.
